title: Ubiquiti UA-G3-Pro-W, UniFi G3 Reader Pro, white
description: The Ubiquiti G3 Reader Pro is the third generation of access readers, supporting authorization via NFC card, Apple Touch Pass *, the UniFi Identity mobile app, face or a numeric code. With its doorbell function, camera, and built-in two-way audio, it allows communication with visitors. The IP55 certification ensures suitability for outdoor use The reader features (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Ethernet port with PoE support. Minimum required version of the UniFi Access application is 3.0.15 * Users will receive 10 free Touch Passes in the first year to get started. Additional passes are per user per year Reader Recessed Mount Box Mounting Panel for US Recessed Box Faceplate (2) Drilling Templates Rubber RJ45 Connector Cover Installation Materials
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 48V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 6
